# Emergency Contact and Manufacturer Service Agreement: Establishing Service Support Protocol and Response Time Commitments

## 适用受众
Facilities_Manager

## 写作角度说明
紧急联系人与厂家服务协议是设施经理与设备厂家建立运维支持体系的关键工作。通过明确服务响应时间、服务范围和紧急联系人，确保设备出现故障时能够快速获得厂家支持。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Establishing a service agreement without defining the remote diagnostic capability — whether the manufacturer can access the BMS and controller remotely — determines whether emergency response requires a site visit (24-48 hours) or remote resolution (2-4 hours).

## 参考素材
- Service agreement types: basic (phone/email support during business hours) → standard (phone support 24/7, remote diagnostics, on-site response within 48 hours) → premium (24/7 on-site response within 24 hours, dedicated service engineer, preventive maintenance visits)
- Critical service parameters: response time definition (time from call to first technician contact) → remote diagnostic availability (VPN access, BMS remote access) → on-site response time → spare parts availability and lead time → escalation procedure
- Emergency contact matrix: primary contact name and phone → secondary contact → after-hours contact → manufacturer's 24/7 support line → local service agent (if applicable)
- Remote access protocol: establish VPN connection procedure for remote BMS access → document access credentials management → define security requirements → test remote access quarterly
- Annual review: review service agreement performance annually → track mean time to repair (MTTR) → adjust agreement terms based on actual performance

## 关键词
Service Agreement, Emergency Contact, Remote Diagnostics, Response Time, Manufacturer Support, Service Level Agreement
